promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next unresolved geometry-heavy axis-note parent after the stage-side axis12 topology reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the usable stage/operator separation, loop-vocabulary lineage, early Stage8 construction, and the direct Axis-3 chirality conflict.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Existing A2-mid batches were used to keep current Axis-3 canon, Topology4 alias rules, and derived-geometry placement distinct from the older note's stronger substrate and naming claims.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred as the next operator-ordering sibling once this geometry-heavy loop note was reduced.
Deferred until the broader Axis-4 QIT note is reduced first.

raw_source_reread_reason: A fresh reread of the raw note was used to preserve exact Hopf/lifted naming claims, Axis-4-later statements, and the foundation-lock language at the end of the file.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the note's most reusable separation and lineage value without importing its stronger Axis-3 and kernel-naming overclaims.
They remain small, comparison-ready, and explicitly downstream of current canon fences.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain direct axis-semantic or kernel-authority conflicts rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after reading the companion A2-mid refinement process.
Used current axis, topology, and geometry A2-mid packets only as comparison anchors.
A fresh raw-source reread was used because the reduction depends on exact kernel-naming and foundation-lock rhetoric in the source.
